title: ScopeReferences
description: Reference Frame for /gabe-scope. Declared at Step 0.5. Every reasoning call receives a framing block built from this file. See gabe-scope-design.md §2.5.

references.description: Array of reference entries. Can be empty (no-framing mode).

id.description: Stable ID. Numbered sequentially as refs are added.

path.description: Local file path, local directory path, or URL

weight.description: Binding level. authoritative = hard constraint; suggestive = soft default; contextual = framing only.

load_mode.description: How the reference is threaded into LLM calls. See design §2.5.

added.description: Date this reference was first added

notes.description: Optional free-form notes about conflict handling, overrides, or context

summary_cached_at.description: When the summary was generated. Required when load_mode=summarize.

summary.description: Cached summary content. Required when load_mode=summarize.
